_model_provenance.trained_on: temporal_cochrane_pairs_enriched.csv (1,669 analysed pairs from 560 Pairwise70 .rda + 557 CrossRef titles; label-flips filter on 3,156 raw pairs)
_model_provenance.method: GBM + sigmoid Platt calibration via CalibratedClassifierCV(cv=5); group-aware temporal split by ma_id (median v1<2015 train / v1>=2015 test), no cardio holdout; word-boundary AACT matching

held_out_metrics.ship_thresholds: AUC>=0.70 PASS; Brier<0.18 PASS; slope in [0.8,1.2] DECLARED DEVIATION

_model_provenance.pipeline_features_provenance: real AACT 2026-04-12 canonical extract with word-boundary matching; 188/3,156 pairs (6.0%) have non-empty pipeline at v1-date
_model_provenance.effect_provenance: native DL+HKSJ pool over source-verified study-level YAML
